basic_details.job_title: MIDHANI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Group General Manager, General Manager Posts

age_limit.details: The age limit for all posts is as per Govt. of India rules. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech (Metallurgy / Material Science), ME/M.Tech (Metallurgy / Material Science), BE/B.Tech (Mechanical / Production / Electrical / Civil), 2-year full-time PG in HR / PMIR / MBA (HR) / MSW
qualification.details: Group General Manager (Production): BE/B.Tech (Metallurgy / Material Science) with >=60% marks and 20 years of experience OR ME/M.Tech with 18 years of experience in production in a metallurgical process plant. Group General Manager (Projects): BE/B.Tech preferably Metallurgy/Mechanical/Production/Electrical/Civil with >=60% marks and 20 years of experience OR ME/M.Tech with 18 years of experience in setting up projects. General Manager (Quality): BE/B.Tech (Metallurgy / Material Science) with >=60% marks and 17 years of experience OR ME/M.Tech with 15 years of experience in quality control in a metallurgical plant. General Manager (R&D): ME/M.Tech (Metallurgy / Material Science) with >=60% marks (PhD preferred) and 15 years of post-qualification experience in R&D. General Manager (HR): Degree preferably in Engineering/Physical Sciences plus a 2-year full-time PG in HR/PMIR/MBA(HR)/MSW and 20 years of post-qualification experience in HR.

salary_details.details: Group General Manager (Production & Projects): Rs. 1,20,000 - 3% - Rs. 2,80,000 (approx CTC Rs. 31.3 Lakhs) Per Month General Manager (Quality, R&D, HR): Rs. 1,00,000 - 3% - Rs. 2,60,000 (approx CTC Rs. 26.0 Lakhs) Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MIDHANI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.midhani-india.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MIDHANI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications by post is 20 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Group General Manager / General Manager posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies available for the Group General Manager / General Manager posts in Mishra Dhatu Nigam Limited (MIDHANI).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for MIDHANI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General and OBC category candidates. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, but generally include BE/B.Tech or ME/M.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines, or a PG degree in HR/PMIR/MBA(HR)/MSW for the HR post, along with significant experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Group General Manager / General Manager posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 1,00,000 to Rs. 2,80,000 per month, with specific ranges for different managerial levels, including approximate CTC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MIDHANI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: shortlisting of applications based on eligibility criteria and a personal interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the rules and regulations of the Government of India.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the MIDHANI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the MIDHANI official website. A link to the PDF is also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of MIDHANI?
faq.answer: MIDHANI is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500058.
